name: Steve Chabot
subject: Abolish the Police?
body:
Abolish the Police? No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Left Now Wants to Abolish the Police](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-j/)
Over the last week, those on the left, and their sympathizers in the mainstream media, have ramped up their radical demand to abolish, defund, dismantle, and even outright ban police departments. In this week's blog, I'll discuss whether reforming law enforcement is warranted. And whether defunding/dismantling police departments is the solution. (Spoiler alert - it's not.) [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [A One-Two Punch](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-d/)
This past week has been a particular challenging time in our nation's history. A Minneapolis police officer knelt on the neck of an unarmed African-American man named George Floyd, and while the world watched, his life was unnecessarily taken away. Condemnation of the officer's action has been universal. There's no excuse for what this officer did.Protests have arisen in cities all over America, peaceful gatherings that are no doubt our constitutional right. Unfortunately, these protests have been sullied by violence and looting. [In this week's blog](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-h/), I discuss this turmoil and offer some words of hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [Trump vs Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-o/)
In this week's blog post I discuss the state of the presidential campaign between President Trump and Joe Biden. How has the coronavirus pandemic changed the race? Who do I think will win? And, why is Biden hunkered down in his basement? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [A Missed Opportunity](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-p/)
Nancy Pelosi's House of Representatives got together last week to vote on legislation crafted by the Democrats - without input from the Republicans. In this week's blog, I discuss this "messaging" bill, which does nothing to help cope with the coronavirus challenge and has no chance at becoming law. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkjldtjy-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: An announcement about the 2020-2021 school year
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Over the last few months, Rhode Island has led the way in distance learning. We didn't throw in the towel when a lot of other states did. Instead, we found ways to make it work. Teachers, parents, and students adapted to new ways of teaching and learning almost overnight. But through hard work and determination, we've learned that we can do it. Kids can successfully learn from home - and that's an important progress in education.
Despite this, I also know there is no replacement for in-person learning. The connections our kids make in the classroom with their peers and their teachers can't ever be fully replaced by virtual experiences. And beyond that -- getting school going again is also a big part of our economic reopening. Having school open means parents can get back to work too.
That's why I am setting the goal today that we return to full in-person school this fall on August 31st.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_SLgfXYOPFZkmOZgJeS3-EzHy3VmxaYkVrBSbLO0mTqbIVpz-hUSquZoxtclJN5hGj2RXlfXqruaD4IA5s345hD1ONNEqZxrh8wWRvbgrgHXCNopdfJeE7RZxEFO96YMQegYcMahEwi73Ao_wwL7HldWvoGNqrGEtBNvBXD1ZE5iDn2hhjADsYOJ5h351OqZkfEDMK07Q87GdLH20hFtSOo6ErDQri6&c=lpmWH1WIaEcalwldM0ZKWDNHz-wVUisj6Fap9b-FPtxVvcWjHYNbNg==&ch=bZRODm9XWTrVq6DfhZSzyH-dex_YFFxHeiVE3eptn3LM0VLDdNBgbg==)
---
| We expect all districts to be working toward the in-person August 31 opening goal in the coming weeks and months. Just like everything that has reopened, school won't be exactly like it was before. We may have to plan for fewer kids on our buses, desks spread further apart, and staggered start times for different grades. It will certainly mean more cleaning. And every district will have to be prepared to continue to offer distance learning throughout the year for when students are sick, quarantined, or not able to return to in-person learning.
We also recognize that different communities have different needs. Each district will have to submit a plan for how they will operate under the new rules. Throughout the summer, RIDE will continue to provide support and share the most up to date information we have to ensure that every district has the support they need to reopen.
What we're talking about here is not the "new normal." It's rebuilding a stronger Rhode Island. Normal was the old way of doing business. Instead, we're going to take the lessons we've learned from this virus and apply them to in-person learning. From now on, when school buildings are closed, learning will still go on. And because we had such great success putting all our schools on one calendar during distance learning, we are going to keep that approach for the next school year. All public school districts will use the same base statewide calendar during the 2020-2021 year.
We also know that safely going back to school will require more investment. Safely getting kids to school may require more buses. Returning to school will certainly require more cleaning products. It may require more staff and more technology. To help districts with some of these additional expenses, we will be distributing $42 million in CARES act funding to schools to support the safe return of students and teachers. I also expect more resources may be necessary. But this is a strong start.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_SLgfXYOPFZkmOZgJeS3-EzHy3VmxaYkVrBSbLO0mTqbIVpz-hUSqbeg4tWQrm2PgJEyvamrnyW_EZp5K3hJZroxaHb0YMbjPUXHxePC5s8fbFKazyRkSkOJSJ7T6QWStIJVHGUvHyXyZaipZegY9xfEGPn8pks6aYAO_SEiZXQ8akIyGG6ac5d0EoS1HMK8GOAaFqzvrE=&c=lpmWH1WIaEcalwldM0ZKWDNHz-wVUisj6Fap9b-FPtxVvcWjHYNbNg==&ch=bZRODm9XWTrVq6DfhZSzyH-dex_YFFxHeiVE3eptn3LM0VLDdNBgbg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001c_SLgfXYOPFZkmOZgJeS3-EzHy3VmxaYkVrBSbLO0mTqbIVpz-hUSqbeg4tWQrm2PgJEyvamrnyW_EZp5K3hJZroxaHb0YMbjPUXHxePC5s8fbFKazyRkSkOJSJ7T6QWStIJVHGUvHyXyZaipZegY9xfEGPn8pks6aYAO_SEiZXQ8akIyGG6ac5d0EoS1HMK8GOAaFqzvrE=&c=lpmWH1WIaEcalwldM0ZKWDNHz-wVUisj6Fap9b-FPtxVvcWjHYNbNg==&ch=bZRODm9XWTrVq6DfhZSzyH-dex_YFFxHeiVE3eptn3LM0VLDdNBgbg==).
---
| This virus has been so hard on everyone. That's particularly true of our senior class who have missed out on so many in person milestones. I want to remind everyone that we have a special statewide graduation ceremony for the Class of 2020. This Monday, June 15 at 7PM, 'Your Year 2020' will air on Rhode Island PBS. We've lined up some exciting guests for you: Actress Viola Davis will deliver the keynote address, we have shout-outs from members of the Patriots and musical performances from Rhode Island's own Billy Gillman and more. It will also feature highlight personal messages from the Class of 2020.
And right after the graduation ceremony, we have a virtual concert for our grads that will also air on Rhode Island PBS. UNITED FOR GRADS will include musical performances from Grammy-nominated musician Jon Batiste, Walk the Moon and others. Shout-outs from celebrities will include Stephen Colbert, Shepard Fairey, who designed our Angel of Hope image, and more. I can't wait for you all to see it.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

subject: Don’t let them silence you

clean_body: Nearly five months into 2020, the global community continues the ongoing battle against the still-surging coronavirus pandemic. | | Hey Peter, What does the coronavirus pandemic mean for our veterans? What happens when VA facilities are strapped for workers and full of virus patients? Now that we are in June, let’s look back at some of the important news and events in May that impact Veterans leading up to the November elections. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | About Coalition for American Veterans was founded by a group of citizens concerned with the treatment our veterans have received since returning from duty, going months and years without seeing their families and risking their lives, only to come home to politicians that do not support them. | | | | Copyright © 2020 Coalition for American Veterans, All rights reserved. | Coalition for American Veterans, PO Box 790, Alexandria, VA 22313, (844) 279-6513

| | Friend, Last week, DFLers across the state filed to run for office in 2020. From Moorhead to Mankato and from Rondo to the Range, the House DFL is running one of the best groups of candidates ever. Now, it's time to get them elected. **Will you pitch in a _refundable_ $50 (or $100 per couple) through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program right now?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YoYZe_EHW5bBrnN0X358S4ysDP0Bf1bOP7kN5NQb6_E=/gBfISkXNSv8rZWQHlDLoDxOB97Q0xQ9PBVbMu_aNQG8=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=061120) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YoYZe_EHW5bBrnN0X358S4ysDP0Bf1bOP7kN5NQb6_E=/gBfISkXNSv8rZWQHlDLoDxOB97Q0xQ9PBVbMu_aNQG8=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=061120) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ Last week also gave us a look inside the operation of the House Republicans and it wasn't pretty. Filing Day for Republicans saw a last minute scramble for candidates, incumbents in flippable seats quitting the race at the final hour, and four seats left uncontested. **DFLers are competing nearly everywhere.** [**_It 's time to act on the disorganization of Minnesota Republicans and secure victory in November, will you help us?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YoYZe_EHW5bBrnN0X358S4ysDP0Bf1bOP7kN5NQb6_E=/IJjQ-_paVb497bJG6hnRmKcUceMxMIZkXCjjoJZJTmQ=?refcode=061120) Together, we will protect and expand our progressive DFL majority in the Minnesota House. will you join me in supporting his campaign? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827429/207902805/721416609?refcode=footer&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)
| | Friends,

I know many of you are probably searching for ways to fight back against the hate and injustice we’re seeing from the highest echelons of our government.

[One of the best ways to achieve real change is to shift power in Washington toward those who are fighting for justice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827430/207902806/-151588957?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)

I want you to meet Rev. Raphael Warnock:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827431/207902807/-151588957?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)
Reverend Warnock is the senior pastor of Atlanta's Ebenezer Baptist Church, America's famed "Freedom Church" and the spiritual home of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

[Now, he is running for the United States Senate in Georgia – and he needs our help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827432/207902808/-151588957?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)

In times like now—when we have a president spewing division and hate, and a country reeling from centuries of systemic oppression and racism—we need Rev. Warnock’s compassionate, moral leadership in the Senate more than ever before.

[He’s facing the full might of Mitch McConnell’s dark money machine, so this will be an uphill battle.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827433/207902809/-151588957?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)

We can win in Georgia, and this could be the race that flips the Senate to Democrats and ends Mitch McConnel's stranglehold on our democracy.

[I know this is a challenging time for many, but if you’re in a position to support Rev. Warnock, can you split a contribution of $10 between his campaign and mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17827434/207902810/-151588957?refcode=EM_FR_B1_061120_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRmMTczMC1mOWFiLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EwPfJ2OP7W6oLHI3TixYtdjrnBB8bs7oVgbKUbEdvY=)

name: MAGASOTA
subject: MAGASOTA Freedom and Liberty 2020
body:
| Peter -- I'm happy to share with you Tuesday night we finally launched the **Freedom and Liberty 2020 campaign for President Trump**. We were delayed several months by the unexpected COVID-19 and the anarchy in Minneapolis. Dedicated and motivated Trump supporters were not deterred by the heat. _It was like a family reunion but better_. No one argued about politics. We had supporters all the way from Little Falls attending. **We agree that we have very little time to waste** _._ The work is immediate. **We also agree that we are at war**. It is freedom and liberty versus anarchy. We cannot take anything for granted and must work like our life depends on it. Because it does. **President Trump needs your help in Minnesota**. We have 99 days before early voting starts. Please call today with your commitment 952-818-9555! Here is our beautiful campaign for our amazing President.

We are making a financial commitment to have literature available for our door to door team members. This is a substantial sum -over $10,000.00. We would be so incredibly grateful for any financial assistance www.magasota.com/contribute

Our next MAGASOTA meetup will be June 16th 6:30-8 pm at the Chanhassen AutoPlex 8150 Audubon Rd Chanhassen. Space is limited. Please reserve your seat [mnfreedom2018@gmail.com](mailto:mnfreedom2018@gmail.com) Have a great weekend! -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=freedom_and_liberty&n=1)
---

| Derek, When **Ann Kuster** and **Chris Pappas** voted for the **Democrats' $3 Trillion Wishlist** , we knew they were doing so due to politics and **Nancy Pelosi** 's marching orders. Their colleague, California Democrat **Katie Porter** , confirmed that reasoning for her - [do Kuster and Pappas agree?](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNDQxMjUyMjc3NTQwMDk5NDI0JmM9czllOSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTc1ODQ5MTQmZD1lNW0waDRr.XXlavBFDJIXhItUkJhVwq1sHnNtz84KIZ1svSKm7D50)

| Ann Kuster and Chris Pappas' $3 Trillion Wishlist included:
* $1,200 payments to illegal immigrants.
* A blanket release of prisoners, including murderers and rapists.
* The use of taxpayer funds to subsidize abortion.
* Forcing states like New Hampshire to comply with stringent federal election mandates, including no ID requirement for in-person voting and ballot harvesting.
* Protecting illegals from deportation and grant them work authorization during the pandemic, allowing them to work at jobs that could be held by unemployed Americans.

Now, does this really sound like the type of plan Granite Staters would want to see during a global pandemic? Democrats are openly discussing how bad this bill is, but they voted for it anyways. This wasn't a case of having to pass the bill before they could find out what was in it - they knew how bad it was and still pushed it through. Democrats like Ann Kuster and Chris Pappas do a phenomenal job as foot soldiers for Nancy Pelosi, but they do a terrible job fighting for New Hampshire. **We need to fight back.**

subject: We need to protect frontline workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
_The Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act_ ensures that frontline workers and their families receive proper compensation for injuries, illness, and death as a result of COVID-19.
This pandemic has shown us just how _essential_ our essential workers are. That's why we **_cannot_** leave essential workers without a safety net, should they contract coronavirus. With Linda's help, the _Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act_ already passed the House. Now, it just needs to get through the Senate.
**[Will you sign on to show the Senate how much the American people support the _Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/D4UQFo5RpMz2C_bQszv4gZNuLkH24QxAt-l8ScF0YIg=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/9N2n2VwKpbW1MuFrMOQzehDx-wildAOMqVkEa0qRCQA=)

While the Act had bipartisan support in the House, the Senate might prove more difficult. Frontline workers _are_ heroes. Let's make sure we look after them.
[**Co-sponsor **](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/D4UQFo5RpMz2C_bQszv4gZNuLkH24QxAt-l8ScF0YIg=)**[the ](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/D4UQFo5RpMz2C_bQszv4gZNuLkH24QxAt-l8ScF0YIg=)[_Pandemic Heroes Compensation Act_](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/D4UQFo5RpMz2C_bQszv4gZNuLkH24QxAt-l8ScF0YIg=)**[** | SIGN YOUR NAME>>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/D4UQFo5RpMz2C_bQszv4gZNuLkH24QxAt-l8ScF0YIg=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/91BmTKIP4VWc0GdcUBJjyIyGggcU6lCr6m8oLEG2eA4=/9N2n2VwKpbW1MuFrMOQzehDx-wildAOMqVkEa0qRCQA=)
Thank you,
\--_Team S anchez_

name: Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.), My Faith Votes
subject: A call for confident Christians
body:
Peter,
I’m excited to tell you that I’m joining with My Faith Votes as a national spokesman, and I look forward to being in touch with you during such an important time for our country.
Christian voters are key to the revival of America and My Faith Votes is the organization with the track record, the passion, and the aggressive plan that is required to get the job done.
My new involvement with My Faith Votes comes at a critical time, and I want to explain why I think that. These last few weeks, after you’ve shut off the TV and laid down for the night, have you felt afraid?
Have you thought to yourself, the America I love is gone?
I understand the urge to feel hopeless, but instead I remind you of Paul’s words in Philippians 4:13: “I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.”
**As Christians, we must take these words to heart because right now, our country desperately needs us. America requires our action. It’s the key to our revival.**
Men and women steeped in the Judeo-Christian faith settled these lands in the name of liberty, they led the fight to abolish slavery, they defeated fascism and totalitarianism abroad, and they led the Civil Rights movement by touting righteousness and love.
**In 2020, with our nation in the midst of social unrest and a crucial election just months away, it’s now our time to stand up and act. It’s our moment to fight the ideological battle to keep faith and freedom at the heart of America.[Will you help by making a secure, tax-deductible donation to My Faith Votes right now](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200611apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=1)?**
[I would not ask this of you if I was not entirely confident that My Faith Votes has the proven battle plan to wake up Christians to defend our Constitution and our biblical values at the polls](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200611apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=2).
They have an extremely aggressive plan to find, recruit and mobilize at least one million Christians in 11 swing states to vote in 2020 -- not only for President but in every critical down-ballot race as well.
I’m looking for confident, courageous Christians who’ll ignore the name-calling and stand up for their Biblical convictions.
Elections have real and lasting consequences, and what is arguably the most polarized and significant election in our lifetime is now just months away.
Will those of us who are Christians protect innocent life against the radical, pro-abortion secular Left or will we be deterred by ridiculous accusations that we are “anti-woman?”
Will we continue to confirm judges who believe in religious liberty, or will we allow politicians who’ve shut down churches while letting looters run amok rule the day?
Standing up for our values in today’s America is not easy, but that doesn’t mean it isn’t right. It is.
I ask you to be confident. I ask you to be bold. I ask you to be part of the solution in 2020.
**Please stand with me by[making a donation to My Faith Votes](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200611apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=3), and let’s revive this nation.**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200611apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=4)
Thank you, and may God bless America.
Sincerely,

Lt. Col. Allen West (Ret.)
National Spokesperson
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=5)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200611apl01nd&n=6).

subject: Have you made a plan to vote?

Friend, Have you made a plan to vote in the Oklahoma Republican primary on June 30th?
**We have a historic opportunity to take back the House this November, and it starts with defeating Kendra Horn here in Oklahoma. ** But if we are going to do it, I believe we need a candidate who is unapologetically conservative, Pro-Trump, and has a background in business. [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/IZsGhM8NWZaZK03HBhSRMw/FTJd6To3hCy5iznGvLd6BQ) **As a small businesswoman in Oklahoma, I helped find jobs for over 37,000 Oklahomans. And now I am ready to get to work helping President Trump restore our economy and bring back the historic growth we saw prior to COVID-19. ** Let me be clear about one other thing: **I 'm not someone who needs a job. I'm not someone who is looking to make friends with the political establishment. What I am is an entrepreneur looking to get things done.**
And that is why I am asking for your vote on June 30th. Sincerely,
Terry Neese [P.S. Have you seen our latest ad? If your means allow, please consider making a small contribution today so we can keep this ad on the air for all of the 5th district to see!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/IZsGhM8NWZaZK03HBhSRMw/FTJd6To3hCy5iznGvLd6BQ)

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: Fwd: Be not afraid. Vote.
body:
Your support is crucial as this fight heats up. Please respond today.
| | | |

Friend,

We sent you a critical update earlier this week.

While election fraud and confusion are rampant, we have the liberal mainstream media ridiculously attempting to claim that we’re fighting fraud that "no one can prove exists." [1]

We’re stretched thin, and we need EVERY supporter on board now. [Will you make your first online donation of 2020 today?](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A388)

Your financial support will help us prepare and file additional lawsuits, recruit an army of poll watchers for November, and inform voters about this assault against free and fair elections to grow our base of support across America.

We’re planning to recruit and train ONE MILLION election volunteers to ensure election integrity this fall. It’s a massive undertaking, but vital for our democracy.

[Make a direct impact in this fight. Please chip in $5, $10, or $25 today](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A388).

Every contribution is a huge help, no matter the amount.

Onward!

Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote

[1] - [GOP recruits army of poll watchers to fight voter fraud no one can prove exists](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A389)

---
| |
---
|
---
| | From: True the Vote <[info@truethevote.org](mailto:info@truethevote.org)>

Date: Monday, June 8, 2020

To: Supporters

Subject: Be not afraid. Vote.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A388)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,

Did you see Catherine’s email last week?

Eight states and Washington, D.C. held primary elections on Tuesday, June 2nd. It was a DISASTER. Chaos ruled the day in many of them... with ballot errors, voters across Baltimore didn't receive their mailed ballots, hours-long lines to vote in person even after the polls closed, and one week later...Philadelphia is still counting votes.

As Catherine has said before, this is ENGINEERED CHAOS. And it’s a preview of what the left wants to see happen across our great country on November 3rd.

They’re fostering electoral dysfunction nationwide, to throw open the door to fraud!

The left has always opposed enhancing election security.
Now, they’re exploiting the COVID-19 pandemic and social unrest to CONTROL election outcomes by pushing mail-in voting.
Tomorrow, six more states will hold primary elections – Georgia, Nevada, North Dakota, South Carolina, South Dakota, and West Virginia.

We’ll be closely monitoring how these elections play out.

With absentee ballot errors and far fewer polling locations, it’s safe to assume we can expect to see a repeat of the chaos that occurred last week.

If you happen to live in one of these states, and you’re looking for election information, you can find it by visiting our [True the Vote Resource Center](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A390). Click on your state to find details on when and where to vote. We’ve also provided your state’s Election Fraud Hotline, for reporting any abuses or potential fraud you might encounter.

We also hope every supporter will consider sustaining our work at this critical time.

We have a lot of work to do to share message with voters, prepare and file lawsuits to stop mail-in voting mayhem, and get a volunteer army of poll watchers in place.

[Follow this link to make a $5, $10, or $25 secure contribution, or more if you can](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=48A80A14A388).

Thank you for all your support, Friend.

Your involvement is crucial to our grassroots-driven nationwide effort to DEFEND free and fair elections in our great country.

Onward!

The True the Vote Team

---

name: Nolan V.
subject: Your impact = DOUBLED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Yesterday, Eugene told you a group of generous donors has offered to match up to $25,000 in grassroots contributions between now and Saturday, and I wanted to take a moment to explain why that is so important.

name: Team Cory
subject: Can you join today's virtual town hall with Cory?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Here are all the details: |
#
Team, just wanted to make sure you saw this. Cory is leading a virtual town hall later today at **6:30 p.m. ET** to discuss his legislation to reform policing and address systemic racism. **[Please RSVP here if you'd be available to participate. Cory will be answering questions during the town hall.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e92/5fca0d19/7d10b4a8/291d4f8d/714234596/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImNhYi1lbS0yMDA2MTEtZm9sbG93dXAifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-the-call-2020?source=cab-em-200611-followup")** Cory's been very busy these past few weeks working on the Justice in Policing Act, which he announced alongside his colleagues on Monday. He'll have important updates to share on this critical legislation during today's call. Hope you can join us, Team Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, Cory is hosting a virtual town hall tomorrow, **Thursday, June 11th** at **6:30 p.m. ET** to discuss his work in the Senate to address systemic racism and to reform policing. **[To dial into the town hall or join by video conference, you must RSVP in advance. Please RSVP here.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e92/5fca0d19/7d10b4a8/291d4f8d/714234596/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImNhYi1lbS0yMDA2MTEtZm9sbG93dXAifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-the-call-2020?source=cab-em-200611-followup")** Earlier this week, Cory announced the Justice in Policing Act, which would create stronger systems of transparency and accountability while bringing needed reform to police departments across the country. This town hall is an opportunity for us to reflect on the events of the past few weeks and talk about our country's path forward. **[RSVP here to participate in the town hall on Thursday. Space is limited so secure your spot today.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e92/5fca0d19/7d10b4a8/291d4f8d/714234596/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImNhYi1lbS0yMDA2MTEtZm9sbG93dXAifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-the-call-2020?source=cab-em-200611-followup")** We hope you can join us. Booker HQ | | [RSVP](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e92/5fca0d19/7d10b4a8/291d4f8d/714234596/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImNhYi1lbS0yMDA2MTEtZm9sbG93dXAifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/join-the-call-2020?source=cab-em-200611-followup")
---

PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
Cory Booker for Senate
8 Lombardy St
PO Box 346
Newark, NJ 07102

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you'd like to update your contact information, you can do so **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0e92/5fca0d19/7d10b4a8/291d4f8c/714234596/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDYxMS1mb2xsb3d1cCJ9/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-update-your-info?source=cab-em-200611-followup-footer")**. body:
Not all Democrats are the same. This election proves that. In our race, Mondaire is the only champion for working families. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UVmkh68e3ZC3aB434fs_c_BsfZYiB1Ea4-voExVuzvHVgJJnzT1bhajmnf1HynjAZh3yO_jAuPfPXjxU9L05TxQOZHPxXAQHjrDombG8XUymEjlJMK4dpXZJIs2Pu7sLyVx_aPJsPfethIv-w5pKIxWbU6zwRLUKczPYSMS9r7AWys96qv7MJk0cQoCg9hfjJnfu8cSLkuTlmqcmgXuGaDvFQSCgJs-qLYv84pZuC4w9ybapQMAH4n4c8804_hoP3/32j/bjoaMo_KRsaFa63enoBBVg/h0/stPrCc6Bs0ybR5_zz6MVLxlLjD1fxsHd6gB_NRI4xAY) Friend,
Not all Democrats are the same. This election proves that.
In our race, Mondaire is the only champion for working families. He’s the only candidate supporting Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and student debt forgiveness. For nearly a year, long before the recent protests, he was the only candidate talking about criminal justice and policing reform.
One of our opponents is a state senator who spent most of his career caucusing with the Republican Party, denying Democrats a majority in the state legislature. Another is the son of a pharmaceutical billionaire and is self-funding his campaign with millions of dollars in Big Pharma money. His tax plan is regressive for working families like mine. Another candidate has taken hundreds of thousands from the defense lobby and high-ranking Republicans, including Ronald Reagan’s Chief of Staff and George W. Bush’s Director of National Intelligence, architect of the Iraq War.
**_All of this in a Democratic Primary_****.**
We have a choice here. We can send a progressive champion to Congress, or another corporate Democrat who will answer to big corporations and special interests instead of everyday people. name: Team MJ (HQ)
subject: What happens in 30 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a7/1390502591/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a6/1390502591/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.1nd__1533__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

In 30 days from Sunday, we'll face _our final test_ before the general election: the July 14th runoff.

In 30 days from Sunday, we need MJ to win the runoff so she can _beat Sen. Cornyn_ in November.

**In 30 days from Sunday, if MJ wins, we 'll be one step closer to _flipping the U.S. Senate._**

From traveling tens of thousands of miles and talking to thousands of Texans, to taking first place in the Texas primary, we've come a long way on this campaign, **but these next 30 days could be the single most important stretch.**
**[We 're setting a one-month-out goal: bringing 2,000 first-time* donors on board before Sunday's deadline. Can we count on you?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a6/1390502591/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.1nd__1533__&amount=10")**
This Sunday marks one month until the runoff, and if we're going to flip the Senate in November, MJ _must_ win on July 14th. There won't be any do-overs. There won't be any more runoffs. What happens on that Tuesday across Texas could make the difference between jumpstarting progress for the Lone Star State and maintaining a broken status quo that's failing Texans.

**[Will you become one of our 2,000 first-time donors before Sunday?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a6/1390502591/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.1nd__1533__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

_*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a6/1390502591/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.1nd__1533__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a5/1390502591/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1533&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901f9/7f51f7bc/4efab7c9/4ef6f6a4/1390502591/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

clean_body: | "" | | | "" Peter, In 30 days from Sunday, we'll face our final test before the general election: the July 14th runoff. In 30 days from Sunday, we need MJ to win the runoff so she can beat Sen. Cornyn in November. In 30 days from Sunday, if MJ wins, we 'll be one step closer to flipping the U.S. Senate. From traveling tens of thousands of miles and talking to thousands of Texans, to taking first place in the Texas primary, we've come a long way on this campaign, but these next 30 days could be the single most important stretch. "" This Sunday marks one month until the runoff, and if we're going to flip the Senate in November, MJ must win on July 14th. There won't be any do-overs. There won't be any more runoffs. What happens on that Tuesday across Texas could make the difference between jumpstarting progress for the Lone Star State and maintaining a broken status quo that's failing Texans. "" \-- Team MJ If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update. "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, ""**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. Friend, Check out our first TV ad, share it with your friends, and then help me keep this message of hope and service up on the air.

| | Friend-

Day after day I try to lead by example. I love my family and my community. I am fortunate to have inherited my Greek father’s work-ethic and my Cuban mother’s passion to fight for what I believe in. I'm an example of the American Dream and I work hard every day to make sure everyone has the same opportunity I did.

With so much divisiveness and negativity on television right now, we need positivity and optimism. Please take a few minutes today and check out our first TV ad, share it with your friends, and then help me keep this message of hope and service up on the air.

[Watch our First TV Ad](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=174A246A1A3169) and [Chip in $25 to help keep it on the air:](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=174A246A1A3169)

name: Updates@Sri2020.com
subject: Donald Trump’s $580,600 fundraiser in Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

$580,600.

That’s how much it’ll cost a wealthy Trump conservative couple to attend the fundraising party being held tonight in Dallas, in the middle of a pandemic.

And that fundraising party? It’s to support a president who used his personal election committee funds to buy coronavirus testing kits for every guest to use despite a nationwide shortage of equipment.

Does that sound like a leader to you?

Look, this isn’t the kind of thing we need in Texas -- not when, just a few miles away from this lavish fundraiser, frontline workers are putting their lives on the line to keep us safe.

And yet, not only is this what Trump is choosing to do with his time, it is also what our Republican opponents are modeling their campaigns after: how to be as divisive and court as many rich corporate donors as possible to put their own interests ahead of ours.

We need to stand against what is happening in Texas tonight -- for our community and for our state. We need to let all our opponents know that their money shouldn’t buy access to our public servants, especially at the expense of the most vulnerable. Can you chip in today and help make that message clear?

Donate ➜ http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.11_us_b1_all&amount=25

While our opponents focus on outdoing each other in their race to be as extreme as possible for attention, Sri has focused his energy on building a campaign that serves our community.

And as Republicans host an in-person fundraising event with outrageous ticket costs during a pandemic and a recession, we’re building and maintaining a fully digital campaign, getting communities impacted by COVID-19 access to necessary resources, and reaching out to voters on the phone, through the mail, and on the air.

That’s the difference, friend -- Sri is running a campaign fully focused on the issues we face as a district.

And to stand up to the forces trying to buy Texas races and seats, we need the power of our grassroots campaign -- we need you. Can we count on your support and make sure we have a representative that will fight for us, not for big checks from corporate donors?

Donate ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.11_us_b1_all&amount=25

Let's get to work,
Team Sri

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.11_us_b1_all&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.11_us_b1_all&amount=25]
Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.11_us_b1_all&amount=25]
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com [https://sri2020.com/]
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e74fe70c-0cac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/e168b552-20ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTY4YjU1Mi0yMGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8igmxvvi3iLdADqCCyh1Hp_4GETFxQOh4_y_sdij37M=&id=117373579 .

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Stage 4 Starts Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
we’re moving into Stage 4 of Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan two days
early!

<>
Friends,

Big news! Governor Holcomb just announced that because of Hoosiers’ continued
good work social distancing and practicing good hygiene – we’re moving into
Stage 4 of Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan two days early!

Stage 4 of this phased reopening officially begins on Friday, June 12 at 12:01
a.m.!

And what does this mean for Hoosiers?

* Social gatherings can include up to 250 Hoosiers
* Restaurants can operate at 75% capacity (with social distancing)
* Bars, nightclubs, movie theaters, bowling alleys, amusement parks, water
parks, and entertainment and tourism sites can open at 50% capacity
* Retail stores and malls can operate at full capacity
* Community recreational games, leagues and tournaments may resume
* Racing venues may open at 50% capacity
* Charity gaming and casinos may open on June 15
* Playgrounds may reopen
* State government buildings are open by appointment
Why is this possible?

We’re seeing a statewide decline in the Hoosiers hospitalized with COVID-19,
we’re seeing ICU and ventilator capacity remain strong, we’ve got more than 200
testing sites available statewide, and we can effectively contact trace
COVID-19 cases to contain the spread.

Now – in order to keep Indiana on track to reach Stage 5 in July, we’re going
to need you to continue your great work as we go into Stage 4. That means
continuing to social distance and wearing a facemask when you go out, and it
means frequently washing your hands and using hand sanitizer.

Yesterday, Governor Holcomb made it clear that this major benchmark is a
credit to you – ranging from our healthcare heroes to our everyday Hoosiers
doing the right thing to protect our most vulnerable friends, family and
neighbors.

Now let’s keep it up as we launch Phase 4 on Friday!

#BackonTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Corporate Media Is Now Controlled by the Radical Left
body:
"Media moguls are resigning at a head-spinning rate, an irrational reaction that’s setting impossible standards and ceding immense power to an..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa465747d0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Corporate Media Is Now Controlled by the Radical Left**

“Media moguls are resigning at a head-spinning rate, an irrational reaction that’s setting impossible standards and ceding immense power to an unreasonable group of fringe ideologues,” Emily Jashinsky writes in _The Federalist_.

“And it’s their own fault. They’ve used elite media platforms to embolden these irrational actors for years. They are failing to meet the standards they’ve promoted.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e43e14d735&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump is signing an executive order [today] that will authorize economic sanctions on employees of the International Criminal Court (ICC) for pursuing investigations into U.S. military and intelligence personnel at Russia’s behest,” Christian Datoc and Henry Rodgers report for [_The Daily Caller_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a02922a481&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Now that the curves have been flattened, and the virus seems to be moderately contained, why are the city and state still disregarding the economic welfare of not only small businesses like ours, but all Big Apple residents and commuters trying to make ends meet?” writes Alexa Michos in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ce0f95d4ea&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Historically, people have been attracted to American journalism because it was the freest imaginable place to work for determined, often quirky individualists. Suddenly, it looks like the opposite of that,” Daniel Henninger writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=83c1170c1d&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=43df8bdb63&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ddf088b3bf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c239d39b10)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Team LaHood
subject: Friend, wish President Trump a happy birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
President Trump’s birthday is on June 14th, and we want to surprise him. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=3b052f8043d944508f3714d034c1b645&_e=xVMGsx-bLLHJ4-WTqscOBdhQ2UCuv0uzNWxaMj-frbjv1476JSQVPEBnNX9usrJYU2qsgpb8UA4Ih2z9DwMBLKEGsPbymd6f5-V1cFNfVAxpVahVqJDRJUMNbWW-yqIdqPMk14MqlCsgUE5FsR0llsOJYVgBx8ka1rLYjHzNnHBB2RsczThz5NYAw9_ETMV0jXrGDsQvmz92zyMNPZhsgT8A_lGcENszD97SUR5rZayUHBMudeBn2u9i6-bmKKjf_aqxeDcdcHrdMUajP1qN0xqUQTalXVfrSgearAEIo_UsTFIPc6xuss_IEAr4skADvVwJsQ5ydgbLwaQatj699AVKqOWfeQD4Gby1ypSrmpmASs7okJSSXdwvZSWcv6iEM36rqbiFrWyIBmX-qIa1xNX8vB7octcEwqFhJGQk8g4LLwTaRbRoObT8OK-b-01gE8VcNVC6UBbTu29aHviblTQ7OP7itUmYNnJF_4i7vU0%3D) | |
---
Friend,

President Donald Trump’s birthday is on June 14th, and we want to surprise him.

_That’s why we’re asking our grassroots movement to sign our birthday card. We know that he’d love to hear well wishes from conservatives across the country._
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=3b052f8043d944508f3714d034c1b645&_e=xVMGsx-bLLHJ4-WTqscOBdhQ2UCuv0uzNWxaMj-frbjv1476JSQVPEBnNX9usrJYU2qsgpb8UA4Ih2z9DwMBLKEGsPbymd6f5-V1cFNfVAxpVahVqJDRJUMNbWW-yqIdqPMk14MqlCsgUE5FsR0llsOJYVgBx8ka1rLYjHzNnHBB2RsczThz5NYAw9_ETMV0jXrGDsQvmz92zyMNPZhsgT8A_lGcENszD97SUR5rZayUHBMudeBn2u9i6-bmKKjf_aqxeDcdcHrdMUajP1qN01zNe6VrQmKFXKJlduZXLq03hEjc-AE58rttPKjwzX_lAzgv6q69UAebRkX06J2p7l5Dl3Ep_mGwKy8MQ0nz-caAVMUQKP8z5lGujkQ8FEwKsQWzfCooGWnf_fst1zx2IqsbHpbp7RmdHeMd1Zm56S6SqzU2mXInr1fUX9tDgZaOwkGnSkKfxZ7Zo--suScQ39GAniH0M0wursLwKqTky90%3D)
_Friend, will you sign our card?_
[**Sign our card and wish President Trump a happy birthday!**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=3b052f8043d944508f3714d034c1b645&_e=xVMGsx-bLLHJ4-WTqscOBdhQ2UCuv0uzNWxaMj-frbjv1476JSQVPEBnNX9usrJYU2qsgpb8UA4Ih2z9DwMBLKEGsPbymd6f5-V1cFNfVAxpVahVqJDRJUMNbWW-yqIdqPMk14MqlCsgUE5FsR0llsOJYVgBx8ka1rLYjHzNnHBB2RsczThz5NYAw9_ETMV0jXrGDsQvmz92zyMNPZhsgT8A_lGcENszD97SUR5rZayUHBMudeBn2u9i6-bmKKjf_aqxeDcdcHrdMUajP1qN00icRbPmWLoCZRJMq-Vc-ggzmmIFeuhK_lmiV9T1yIPEnnjcBFyxTSFPG_d8e6QSMRC_ycxZVo8YihGumoI_lMbojpfwM-Rvi8YvqQvTtm51ZVIjVD9tV6K0cuOJILzzkEHbGC607pWzGmxzgvbsvF65FUHMfbnUu9zLnK5qpWu2x7V8JQW7NYxV-ko3k2osI8LvQr0_s1hfjXgI5Ru59Ho%3D)
**It’s a surprise so shhh — don’t let him know.**

We know he’s going to be ecstatic to see the names of all our grassroots supporters on his card, and we thank you for taking the time to help us with our surprise.

Regards,

Team LaHood

body:

| | This morning I was honored to endorse Tracey Mann for Kansas' First Congressional District.

Tracey Mann is one of the best people I have met throughout my time in public service. Tracey is a conservative. He is a family man with deep roots in Kansas agriculture and our rural communities.

Tracey left his mark in his time as Kansas Lieutenant Governor, pushing back on behalf of agriculture producers on needless federal overreach.

Tracey will make a great member of Congress. I urge you to join me in supporting Tracey's campaign today.

[Whether it's volunteering or making your most generous contribution today, it is time to step up and make a difference.](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=458ce2c11d&e=a9d1410029)

Yours in the fight for America,

Governor Jeff Colyer, M.D.

[ ](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b440/388db0e9/8c7f45d/609bfcfd/2431120919/VEsH/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conoleforcongress.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1")

| | Friends, There are just 12 days left in this primary election, so we are moving quickly on our final Get Out the Vote plan. We need to raise $10,000 between now and Election Day to make sure we have the final resources we need to win. **[And yes, I'm asking you to contribute toward that big goal, but let me tell you the three big buckets we'll be focusing on:](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b440/388db0e9/8c7f45d/609bfcfc/2431120919/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9qdW5lIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkNPTl9FTV9GUl8yMDA2MTFfR09UVjFfVTFfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_june?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+And+yes+Irsquom+asking+you+to+contribute&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1")**
* **Direct Mail -** we are sending thousands of pieces of mail directly to voters to let them know about Francis' positive vision for this district.
* **Television Ads -** most New Yorkers are still staying home, so we know that the best way to reach folks is on their television sets, so we're investing heavily in these.
* **Volunteer-led voter contact -** we are making phone calls, sending texts, and having our volunteers reach out to their social media networks to get out the vote for Francis!

We know we have the recipe for success, but raising a final $10,000 into our GOTV Fund will mean we can make sure Francis wins on primary day and is ready to flip one of the only districts that Hillary Clinton won that's still held by a Trump-supporting Republican. **[So, can we count on you to chip in?](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b440/388db0e9/8c7f45d/609bfcfb/2431120919/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9qdW5lIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkNPTl9FTV9GUl8yMDA2MTFfR09UVjFfVTFfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_june?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+So+can+we+count+on+you+to+chip+in&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1") Your support has never been more critical.** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b440/388db0e9/8c7f45d/609bfcfa/2431120919/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9qdW5lIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6IkNPTl9FTV9GUl8yMDA2MTFfR09UVjFfVTFfWDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_june?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200611_GOTV1_U1_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Todd=20McMurtry?=
subject: PHOTOS: Confederate Flag Flown at Massie’s Home
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMurtry for Congress_
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/772e1d9a2cbf/exclusive-new-ad-alert-9331444?e=5ac6ff05c3)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

**The [Courier Journal](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=6c7aca545e&e=5ac6ff05c3) shared photos this week of Congressman Thomas Massie flying the Confederate battle flag in his home.** The photos were found on his personal blog, [massiehouse.blogspot.com](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=f77f27e440&e=5ac6ff05c3), if you'd like to see them for yourself. ([July](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=e8454ffef8&e=5ac6ff05c3), [August](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=ebef102bd7&e=5ac6ff05c3), [September ](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=714ae7c96f&e=5ac6ff05c3)and [October ](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=dfd56f1105&e=5ac6ff05c3)of 2006)
---
|
---
| Congressman Massie's record offers little comfort in his intentions:
* Massie [voted AGAINST the Emmett Till Antilynching Act](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=36ff4fb666&e=5ac6ff05c3), which makes it a federal crime to engage in a lynching.
* Massie DEFENDED disgraced Congressman Steve King for his [racist comments](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=46101aa40b&e=5ac6ff05c3).
* Massie Claimed he didn't see any "[articulate people](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=4251c08ee4&e=5ac6ff05c3)" among the peaceful protests.

These are not Kentucky values. These are not American values. The people of Iowa voted Steve King out of office this past week for his unacceptable behavior in regards to race. What will Kentucky do?

We have just over two weeks until the election, and we need help getting the word out about Congressman Massie's shameful record. We know times are tough, but [please consider a contribution of $100, $50, or even $25](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=37a252b8ac&e=5ac6ff05c3). Every bit helps us get the word out. Thank you.

Sincerely,
Todd McMurtry

P.S. Now is the time to make a difference in this race. [Donate what you can](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=09788ba4ed&e=5ac6ff05c3) \- every dollar will go toward defeating Thomas Massie in the June 23 primary.

---
| [DONATE NOW](https://triumphcampaigns.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4871957391bbb49d4a9c3033e&id=eeae6b429c&e=5ac6ff05c3 "DONATE NOW")

name: Alex Koren
subject: GOP Convention in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17834892/208053492/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk1Y2NmYi0zM2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZ0Ecdr1W8Sloni7UjJg2pK1dFsYAiWCCc7YD9AFsWI=&emci=7c55baae-32ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ab95ccfb-33ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) **["GOP Expects to Move its Convention to Jacksonville"](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17834893/208053493/-54394814?contactdata=3buck3bbVCRZLZiHLGqOWKCqtEBHbTm8iLfeX8eUQHMbkwuxnLbnTRhTl91pROLrIHNs9ydHvXwSmMm9ZGJNYcedyMXM7%2Fek5YFuflVSo8ZDkkC6DSXcBw4TDhk%2BUhF0eLR%2BK4nSJKzxxwyw7k9bNg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk1Y2NmYi0zM2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZ0Ecdr1W8Sloni7UjJg2pK1dFsYAiWCCc7YD9AFsWI=&emci=7c55baae-32ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ab95ccfb-33ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** _-Washington Post, 6/10/2020_ Friends,

The Washington Post just announced that the Republican National Convention is likely to move its massive August event to Florida.

It’s no coincidence that President Trump is eyeing the Sunshine State — his re-election and success are dependent on us and our historically razor-thin margin of victory.

It’s no surprise Trump found a willing ally in Governor DeSantis as he was searching for someone willing to disregard CDC guidelines and put his own community at risk in order to host what amounts to a giant party.

**[So, we want to know what you think of this potential move — should the GOP move their convention to Florida?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17834894/208053494/-54394814?contactdata=3buck3bbVCRZLZiHLGqOWKCqtEBHbTm8iLfeX8eUQHMbkwuxnLbnTRhTl91pROLrIHNs9ydHvXwSmMm9ZGJNYcedyMXM7%2Fek5YFuflVSo8ZDkkC6DSXcBw4TDhk%2BUhF0eLR%2BK4nSJKzxxwyw7k9bNg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk1Y2NmYi0zM2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZ0Ecdr1W8Sloni7UjJg2pK1dFsYAiWCCc7YD9AFsWI=&emci=7c55baae-32ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ab95ccfb-33ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17834895/208053495/-54394814?contactdata=3buck3bbVCRZLZiHLGqOWKCqtEBHbTm8iLfeX8eUQHMbkwuxnLbnTRhTl91pROLrIHNs9ydHvXwSmMm9ZGJNYcedyMXM7%2Fek5YFuflVSo8ZDkkC6DSXcBw4TDhk%2BUhF0eLR%2BK4nSJKzxxwyw7k9bNg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk1Y2NmYi0zM2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZ0Ecdr1W8Sloni7UjJg2pK1dFsYAiWCCc7YD9AFsWI=&emci=7c55baae-32ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ab95ccfb-33ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17834896/208053496/-54394814?contactdata=3buck3bbVCRZLZiHLGqOWKCqtEBHbTm8iLfeX8eUQHMbkwuxnLbnTRhTl91pROLrIHNs9ydHvXwSmMm9ZGJNYcedyMXM7%2Fek5YFuflVSo8ZDkkC6DSXcBw4TDhk%2BUhF0eLR%2BK4nSJKzxxwyw7k9bNg%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjk1Y2NmYi0zM2FjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZ0Ecdr1W8Sloni7UjJg2pK1dFsYAiWCCc7YD9AFsWI=&emci=7c55baae-32ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ab95ccfb-33ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)

Margaret has the chance to flip a seat that will allow the Democrats to take back Florida in November. We have to show them that we’re standing up for our communities and for our health.

Thanks so much for your input — we’ll keep you posted as we hear more.

Alex Koren
Campaign Manager
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. body:
It's now countdown one week: The Indiana Republican State Convention will be broadcast LIVE statewide on Thursday, June 18. You'll hear directly from | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/more-updates-indiana-republican-state-convention-469333?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **One Week: 2020 Indiana Republican Convention**
---
| Indiana Republicans,

**It's now the one week countdown: The Indiana Republican State Convention will be broadcast LIVE statewide on Thursday, June 18.**

You'll hear directly from Governor Eric Holcomb, Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch, our four attorney general candidates, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer...and also a few suprises.

**You can tune in statewide at 5:30 p.m. ET/4:30 p.m. CT:**
* **Indianapolis: Watch on WISH-TV (Channel 8)**
* **South Bend: Watch on WHME-TV (Channel 46)**
* **Other stations may still be announced**
* **Livestream:[Indiana.gop/stateconvention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bfdf97ab71&e=1acd9bb3d6) or [Facebook.com/indgop](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=32bbbc0d08&e=1acd9bb3d6)**

These videos will be shared broadly after the live event so that any delegate (or any Hoosier!) who misses the live broadcast will still be able to view it. Please reach out if you have any questions on the best way for you to view this special broadcast.
Additionally, we're excited to share with you the 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention Official Program. [You can view it here. ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=437a578eeb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=88dd02f0e6&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **For Hoosiers serving as delegates who have paid their delegate fees, you should start receiving your ballot on June 22. **For more information for delegates -- including upcoming deadlines, a link for paying delegate fees, a video explaining voting, and more FAQs -- please [visit our updated convention website here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e3693715e6&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Thank you,
-Indiana Republican Party

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: ACTION: Make your voice heard on SB 463
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa47a/34a064cc/1b80d1e9/702f65f/3856667112/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Hi Friend, During the primary elections, Georgians faced [up to 8-hour lines](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa47a/34a064cc/1b80d1e9/702f65c/3856667112/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.wsbtv.com/news/politics/metro-voters-wait-long-lines-hours-final-day-early-voting/ZWKHCHJIBNCLRLTI4KJ5WT6XIU/") and thousands of absentee ballots that were never received. Depending on where a person lives in Georgia, their access to this fundamental right differs, and that is unacceptable. The Secretary of State is not taking responsibility and choosing to blame under-resourced county officials and under-trained poll workers, but the Georgia Constitution makes clear that the buck stops with the Secretary of State. He is the chief election official, and it is his job to make sure that every Georgian has the right to vote without undue burden. That's the job he asked for. That's the job he's got. Therefore, Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger must fix the problem immediately - before millions of Georgians face hours in line, risk COVID-19 exposure, unsent absentee ballots, and uncertainty about whether their votes will count. Raffensperger said he wanted difficult voting experiences to be one in a billion and that no Georgian should have to wait more than 30 minutes to vote. If that's what he wants, he must take steps to make this a reality. He has failed to provide counties with the resources and training to meet the standard _he set._ Right now, the Secretary of State has proposed legislation, Senate Bill 463, that does the exact opposite. **● Every County Is On Its Own:** SB 463 changes the law to say that the State Election Board - responsible for oversight - no longer has to actually do its job. The bill will instead make it each county's problem, without the necessary training, funding, or support. Rather than taking steps to reduce lines, the bill will tell every Georgian that they only get the democracy their county can afford. For rural counties, our largest area, this means we will see a WORSENING of the current problems in Georgia, where democracy looks different depending on which county you live in. The state should be supporting counties, not hanging them out to dry, so voters have equal access to the vote. **● Guess Where You Vote:** SB 463 fails to properly notify voters of polling locations changes, which will lead to longer lines and more provisional ballots if voters go to the wrong location. Due to COVID-19, locations may not be available. Voters should not be penalized, and if the law does not mandate notification, too many Georgia voters will be forced to risk missing the election altogether. **● Defacto ID Requirement:** SB 463 enacts a new ID provision, that could turn into a de facto ID requirement whereby voters must have access to printers to mail copies of their ID to ensure their ballots are not rejected. This new provision may cause more absentee ballots to be rejected because of the new rules, which will lead to longer lines as voters who requested ballots have to vote in person. This provision goes in the WRONG direction. **● Not Enough Equipment:** SB 463 fails to mandate the appropriate number of machines at each polling location and fails to ensure enough check-in stations, all of which lead to longer lines as people have to wait in crowded lines, increasing their risk of illness or losing their right to vote. **● Too Risky To Vote In Person:** SB 463 fails to expand access to vote by mail, which will lead to longer lines. Georgia saw an unprecedented number of voters use vote-by-mail. This keeps those who can vote from home safe AND it protects brave poll workers, the disabled, those with language barriers, the displaced, and those who could not send in their ballots. The more folks who vote from home, the safer it is for those who have no choice but to vote in person. **WE NEED YOUR HELP TO FIX THIS VERY BAD BILL AND NOT LET THE SECRETARY OF STATE PASS THE BUCK TO COUNTIES & CAUSE MORE PROBLEMS. EVERY VOTER IN GEORGIA MUST BE PROTECTED.

** **THIS IS HOW YOU CAN HELP:** Call David Ralston NOW and tell him to FIX SB 463: 404-656-5020 Call House Government Affairs Chairman, Shaw Blackmon and tell him to FIX SB 463: 404.463.7853 Thank You, Andre D. Fields
Political Director, Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa47a/34a064cc/1b80d1e9/702f65d/3856667112/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa47a/34a064cc/1b80d1e9/702f65a/3856667112/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa47a/34a064cc/1b80d1e9/702f65b/3856667112/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

Team,
We just got some big news about the Kentucky Senate race:
**A new poll out today shows that Democrat Amy McGrath just took the lead over Mitch McConnell. This is the clearest sign yet that this Senate seat is in play this November.**
**[Will you rush in a $5 contribution now to help Amy defeat Mitch in Kentucky?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200609-mcgrath?refcode=em200610i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Republicans once thought this was a safe seat -- but with Amy taking a one-point lead, there is no denying that Democrats are within striking distance of removing McConnell from the Senate.
Mitch McConnell isn't just failing the nation as Majority Leader -- he's letting his entire state down by pushing for the GOP's extreme agenda instead of fighting for Kentucky families.
That's why we need to beat him at the polls this November. Amy McGrath, a former Marine fighter pilot, is up for the challenge -- but she needs all of us to have her back in this fight.
**[Are you ready to defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate? Make a $5 contribution now to support Amy McGrath in this crucial 2020 race.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200609-mcgrath?refcode=em200610i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Let’s Talk about Racism
body:
On June 19th, President Trump will resume his campaign rallies in Tulsa, Oklahoma.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379477-893775-5038252-f3fb5d1fea-368b3012fa)
Patriot,

On June 19th, President Trump will resume his campaign rallies in Tulsa, Oklahoma.

The timing and location of the rally stands as a reminder of America’s violent history of racism.

While June 19th, known as Juneteenth, is widely known as the anniversary of the day that the last enslaved African-Americans were read President Lincoln’s Emancipation Proclamation, most Americans remain unaware of the significance of Tulsa, Oklahoma.

In 1921, Tulsa was home of the Greenwood neighborhood that was known as “Black Wall Street.”

It was a booming economy of Black-owned businesses, one of the most successful areas for African-Americans in the nation.

A stroll in Greenwood would take you past doctors, attorneys, grocery stores, real-estate offices and churches . . . all owned by African-American entrepreneurs.

The small town was booming with success.

Only 56 years separated Juneteenth from the rise of Black Wall Street. Many of Greenwood’s residents grew up as slaves while some of Tulsa’s white residents were former slave owners.

In a perfect world, it was an amazing story of recovery from the trauma of both the Civil War and slavery in our nation.

But America was far from perfect in 1921 and the success of the Black community bred resentment among many white residents in Tulsa.

At 1 a.m. on June 1, 1921, following a day of conflict, a white mob set fire to businesses on Black Wall Street.

At sunrise, the riots shifted to an armed massacre as white gunmen filled the streets of Greenwood and gunned down black residents who either attempted to flee or defend their own lives.

Private planes circled above the town dropping firebombs on businesses and homes to quell what local law enforcement was calling a “Negro uprising.”

With the assistance of the Oklahoma National Guard, over 6,000 African-American residents of Greenwood were interned.

A state commission later found that 300 Americans were killed in the massacre while over 800 men, women and children were hospitalized.

Ninety-Nine years later, the event is known as the “Black Wall Street Massacre.”

And when ignorance prevails, it could happen again.

The Black Wall Street Massacre was set off by a single event . . . a black shoe shiner was accused of assaulting of a 17-year-old white girl. Rumors rapidly grew of the man being lynched and the black community rallied for justice.

It was a powder keg looking for a spark.

Today, with the murder of George Floyd fresh in the minds of Americans around the nation, we need to all look back at the horror of Tulsa and the ignorance of racial divide.

President Trump choosing Tulsa as his first rally gives us an opportunity to tell the story of the Black Wall Street Massacre and remind ourselves what happens when we look at each other based upon the color of our skin.

The contrast of our skin color has nothing to do with our character, but it is used all too often to divide us for power and political gain.

Democrats, spurred by the liberal media, actively work to keep tensions high as a means of control to maintain or increase their own power.

Malcolm X noted this when he said, “The Negro revolution is controlled by foxy white liberals, by the Government itself.”

It’s an undeniable truth that the Democrat Party is institutionally racist by instigating division among Americans based on the color of their skin or family origin.

They weaponize racism with the hypocrisy of labeling anyone who opposes their policies as “racist” or a “white supremacist.”

As a Jewish woman, I have been labeled a “white supremacist” by Democrat officials while actual racists call me a “white-hating heeb.”

Highly paid Democrat operatives actively work behind the scenes to foment hate against Trump supporters by branding them as racists and “nazis”.

While racism definitely exists within a small ignorant population, the reality is that racism is more widely used as a dangerous, unethical tactic to keep Democrats in power.

Our unity as Americans transcends race, party and culture. We are all brothers and sisters bound by the promise of prosperity. As our nation recovers from suffering from the Coronavirus Pandemic, we must reject the “division for power” strategy by whom Malcolm X called “foxy white liberals” like Nancy Pelosi, and work toward the only goal that matters to ourselves and our families . . . to Make America Great Again.

Laura Loomer

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-379477-893775-5038253-5db7e3eb1b-368b3012fa)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---

720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-379477-893775-84585d41bbe610b-368b3012fa)
