name: Michelle De La Isla
subject: We need safe options to vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
Every Kansan, every American, who wants to exercise their right to vote should be able to do so safely.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

Last month Wisconsin held elections in the midst of this pandemic. The outpouring of individuals showing up at the polls to exercise their right to vote was nothing less than inspiring. However, the lines were too long and people waited for hours to cast their ballot.

Every Kansan, every American, who wants to exercise their right to vote, no matter their party, should be able to do so safely. One of the best ways to make sure they can is to make sure Congress passes a universal vote by mail option.

[**Add your name to stand with me in calling on Congress to pass a universal vote-by-mail option.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17835553/208074007/-1970524178?source=De-La-Isla&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-De-La-Isla-AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc2MGYzNi0zZGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PY7NHGFwnk1z_04jmGnlyV5cotKo--1kSd1Hbsjr-y4=&emci=e769a463-23ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ca760f36-3dac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9593007)

As communities and local economies reopen we must ensure that those who are vulnerable or just want to stay home to limit in person contact with the public can do so without additional challenges. More dollars have to be allocated to states and counties to make this happen, a federal vote by mail plan will help.

This is not a political issue, this is coming from the heart of a Mayor and Congressional hopeful, who wants to ensure that everyone has an equal opportunity to exercise their right to vote. Our voices matter, our elections matter.

[**If you agree, add your name to join me in calling for universal mail-in voting.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17835554/208074008/-1970524178?source=De-La-Isla&redirect_url=https://sign.actiontaker.org/VBM-Option-De-La-Isla-AB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc2MGYzNi0zZGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PY7NHGFwnk1z_04jmGnlyV5cotKo--1kSd1Hbsjr-y4=&emci=e769a463-23ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=ca760f36-3dac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9593007)

Thanks,

Michelle

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17835555/208074009/-265194322?gpsid=40_122_13388&refcode=em20_200611_VBM_adv_gq_act__MDLA_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200611_VBM_adv_gq_act__MDLA_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTc2MGYzNi0zZGFjLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PY7NHGFwnk1z_04jmGnlyV5cotKo--1kSd1Hbsjr-y4=)

name: Team Rita
subject: The latest edition of The Rita Review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/CIQI9W8oqYTU9ji1l9rxYyeZWmDLsIjUFb-dJcff8LI=?refcode=200611-email) _Welcome to the latest edition of the Rita Review! It 's been a busy month, and we're happy to share all the campaign happenings with you: _ **GREAT news from the Primary Election!** Rita is moving on towards the General Election, and thanks to record-breaking turnout, she won more votes than all the Republican candidates COMBINED. This shows just how much momentum there is behind our campaign, and we couldn't have done it without every single one of you. We can't take anything for granted in a race this competitive. Republican lawmakers are _already_ trying to limit vote-by-mail in the November election in an attempt to stymie turnout once again. Help us keep fighting for Rita by spreading the word and helping us gear up for the General. **Important Discussions: Living Through A Pandemic With A Disability** Rita held a virtual call with her nephew, Tucker Cassidy. Tucker was a victim of gun violence in his college years and has been a quadriplegic since. He has become an advocate deeply involved with **Disability Caucus of the Iowa Democratic Party** and **#upgradeMedicaid**. Rita interviewed Tucker about living with a disability during this pandemic. They talked about challenges and how important our frontline health care workers are right now. Tucker asked that we share these resources for people with disabilities:
1. Contact your health care agency case manager, your MCO case manager, or DHS case manager
2. [Masks For The Frontlines Facebook group](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/wFjUTfsAGoel2hGZ3PPAOXW-PzWj_5uYBqu4TvzHCHo=)
3. National Disability COVID-19 Healthcare Support And Advocacy Hotline: 1-800-626-4959
4. The Disability Underground Network: [disabilityunderground.org](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/ppaWcllbIa6V1GhaUOrwjcmIp_5S8G3ALewODEw5LDE=)
5. Reach out to Iowa Homeland Security and Emergency Management to talk to your County Emergency Services Coordinator
6. Your local Food Bank and/or Crisis Center
7. National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: 1-800-273-8255

If you have time, check out the full video of our discussion below! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/fo8CB06MpNKsx8rd5tBqYKiY8YAMAsv3rtss_iXN2aA=) **One Year Anniversary For The Campaign** On May 14th, we celebrated the one year anniversary of kicking off Rita's campaign! It was an exciting day for all of us, and one we will never forget. This campaign is driven by the passion of Rita's supporters, all of whom are ready to see real, authentic change be enacted. Rita is ready to find common ground and move our state forward. It's been quite a year, and it's one we will never forget!

Learn more about Rita's journey in this [article](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/cmIXoG8aHqSmAOJjmTHiLAnRL98Mfoaj_1JlpUdv30U=) by our friends at the QC Times. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/cmIXoG8aHqSmAOJjmTHiLAnRL98Mfoaj_1JlpUdv30U=) **THREE Big Endorsement** Rita recently earned the endorsement from three big groups -- some of them from unlikely places. Rita is proud to announce that she earned the endorsement of Republican leaders across the district who are crossing party lines to support Rita's campaign over our Republican opponent. The endorsements include people like Davenport Alderman-At-Large Jason Gordon and former Clinton County supervisor Jill Davisson. **[Read more about Republicans for Rita HERE](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/Nd6KSvR9L0QkM82_StYkthfFbFCDtMMxWsIXOYcds90=)** Other endorsements include Senator Amy Klobuchar's Win Big Project and the Human Rights Campaign, two great organizations fighting for integrity and justice in Washington. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/L19wieLwaWPnlAVI948bDoTyFFE910ef6imEK1bWK-o=) **Virtual Volunteer Meetups** The IA-02 Field Team never ceases to amaze! Rita has had several meetups, all of which were packed with excellent ideas, views and people. We couldn't be more proud of the way we've all come together even as we need to stay apart. If you are interested in joining our volunteer team, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/U8_fiVQiFSgjH5kuO-BJKjWMFfODHXBv4J7dNMO4ZnY=) to sign up and a team member will be in touch! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/U8_fiVQiFSgjH5kuO-BJKjWMFfODHXBv4J7dNMO4ZnY=) **Staying Busy At The Farm** When Rita isn't working on her campaign, she's getting her hands dirty at the farm! Planting is officially done, and we are all hoping it'll be a bountiful harvest -- and election cycle! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/_lK0j7kxvCquaZtCsXxbW8oHLD8HEMAl9f61OLjmhKg=?refcode=200611-email) _That 's it for the latest edition of the Rita Review. We're continuing to travel and listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd District, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so. _ \- Team Rita | ____**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/CIQI9W8oqYTU9ji1l9rxYyeZWmDLsIjUFb-dJcff8LI=?refcode=200611-email)**____

____If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/loSqxG2jPUl8fvzMTfBRnJFJiPyIXbnS8vfkvQ_UUS4=/B5vId_eaqfcn7amdz2xe6Kg4WOeM9W8qxkiVBIYRq34=).____

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the latest edition of the Rita Review! It 's been a busy month, and we're happy to share all the campaign happenings with you: GREAT news from the Primary Election! Rita is moving on towards the General Election, and thanks to record-breaking turnout, she won more votes than all the Republican candidates COMBINED. This shows just how much momentum there is behind our campaign, and we couldn't have done it without every single one of you. We can't take anything for granted in a race this competitive. Republican lawmakers are already trying to limit vote-by-mail in the November election in an attempt to stymie turnout once again. Help us keep fighting for Rita by spreading the word and helping us gear up for the General. Important Discussions: Living Through A Pandemic With A Disability Rita held a virtual call with her nephew, Tucker Cassidy. Tucker was a victim of gun violence in his college years and has been a quadriplegic since. He has become an advocate deeply involved with Disability Caucus of the Iowa Democratic Party and #upgradeMedicaid. Rita interviewed Tucker about living with a disability during this pandemic. They talked about challenges and how important our frontline health care workers are right now. Tucker asked that we share these resources for people with disabilities: 1. Contact your health care agency case manager, your MCO case manager, or DHS case manager 2. = 3. National Disability COVID-19 Healthcare Support And Advocacy Hotline: 1-800-626-4959 4. The Disability Underground Network: = 5. Reach out to Iowa Homeland Security and Emergency Management to talk to your County Emergency Services Coordinator 6. Your local Food Bank and/or Crisis Center 7. National Suicide Prevention Lifeline: 1-800-273-8255 If you have time, check out the full video of our discussion below! = One Year Anniversary For The Campaign On May 14th, we celebrated the one year anniversary of kicking off Rita's campaign! It was an exciting day for all of us, and one we will never forget. This campaign is driven by the passion of Rita's supporters, all of whom are ready to see real, authentic change be enacted. Rita is ready to find common ground and move our state forward. It's been quite a year, and it's one we will never forget! Learn more about Rita's journey in this = by our friends at the QC Times. = THREE Big Endorsement Rita recently earned the endorsement from three big groups -- some of them from unlikely places. Rita is proud to announce that she earned the endorsement of Republican leaders across the district who are crossing party lines to support Rita's campaign over our Republican opponent. The endorsements include people like Davenport Alderman-At-Large Jason Gordon and former Clinton County supervisor Jill Davisson. = Other endorsements include Senator Amy Klobuchar's Win Big Project and the Human Rights Campaign, two great organizations fighting for integrity and justice in Washington. = Virtual Volunteer Meetups The IA-02 Field Team never ceases to amaze! Rita has had several meetups, all of which were packed with excellent ideas, views and people. We couldn't be more proud of the way we've all come together even as we need to stay apart. If you are interested in joining our volunteer team, = to sign up and a team member will be in touch! = Staying Busy At The Farm When Rita isn't working on her campaign, she's getting her hands dirty at the farm! Planting is officially done, and we are all hoping it'll be a bountiful harvest -- and election cycle! That 's it for the latest edition of the Rita Review. We're continuing to travel and listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd District, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so. \- Team Rita | ____ Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa Rita Hart for Iowa P.O. Box 333 Wheatland IA 52777 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=. __

name: Madison, MJ for Texas
subject: I can't believe there are only 30 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Only a month before our final test.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f921/3835648820/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter -- Just wanted to make sure you saw this -- this Sunday marks 30 days from the runoff.

The next month could be the single most important stretch of our campaign and we've got to give it all we've got. We can't wake up on Wednesday after the runoff wishing we had done more.

**[That's why our team has set a goal of bringing 2,000 first-time* donors on board before Sunday. Will you help us keep up our momentum and propel us into the next 30 days before the runoff?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f920/3835648820/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.2nd__1536__&amount=10")** Thanks,
Madison Goldstein
Deputy Finance Director, MJ for Texas \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Team MJ (HQ)**
Subject: What happens in 30 days
> Peter,
>
> In 30 days from Sunday, we'll face _our final test_ before the general election: the July 14th runoff.
>
> In 30 days from Sunday, we need MJ to win the runoff so she can _beat Sen. Cornyn_ in November.
>
> **In 30 days from Sunday, if MJ wins, we 'll be one step closer to _flipping the U.S. Senate._**
>
> From traveling tens of thousands of miles and talking to thousands of Texans, to taking first place in the Texas primary, we've come a long way on this campaign, **but these next 30 days could be the single most important stretch.** **[We're setting a one-month-out goal: bringing 2,000 first-time* donors on board before Sunday's deadline. Can we count on you?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f920/3835648820/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.2nd__1536__&amount=10")** This Sunday marks one month until the runoff, and if we're going to flip the Senate in November, MJ _must_ win on July 14th. There won't be any do-overs. There won't be any more runoffs. What happens on that Tuesday across Texas could make the difference between jumpstarting progress for the Lone Star State and maintaining a broken status quo that's failing Texans.
>
> **[Will you become one of our 2,000 first-time donors before Sunday?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f920/3835648820/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.2nd__1536__&amount=10")** \-- Team MJ
>
> _*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._
>
> **[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f920/3835648820/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200611.2nd__1536__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f927/3835648820/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MzYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1536&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901fb/7f51f7bc/4eff9787/4ef6f926/3835648820/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

Round Rock, TX 78683

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saying "hello" during COVID-19
body:
Your COVID-19 news update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Every day, I'm inspired by Rhode Islanders. Throughout this crisis, I've seen neighbors lending a hand, picking up groceries, and checking in on one another. I've seen families finding creative ways to celebrate a graduation, or a wedding, or a birthday. And I've seen people not just follow, but embrace, all of the public health guidance, from expressing your personality with a unique mask to using technology to stay close to one another. Because of your adherence to the rules, we're continuing to stop the spread of COVID-19 here in Rhode Island. Here are today's numbers:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehsqLwCCBGIZk1HcsnalGkUGzIs1moYxujAGro3vY3p4a3lFEQHFi8d4Amx-00N63AsDesG4WEcxmfrZbTSh5AoIDufCnvAku1cEUSGQ4idwWCXWZrcc9YmRowIJjzhx2wSK-t_LlmwFItwrHO7wAd3-txnpJ2grWf8nGksFSnRqNdrKwbbViww6zjqFN4rlzxw0WmnOhUQ=&c=4-PJ6AR2WU4vdAJbwTTBo-acXTz_EmS6s7MV1_4akQAtYALshxUY9w==&ch=ud3Z427g47GDzyH6_lsYEC_fSxwoqSJ8-xWw6R8YledtK75X6Xe1FA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehsqLwCCBGIZk1HcsnalGkUGzIs1moYxujAGro3vY3p4a3lFEQHFi8d4Amx-00N63AsDesG4WEcxmfrZbTSh5AoIDufCnvAku1cEUSGQ4idwWCXWZrcc9YmRowIJjzhx2wSK-t_LlmwFItwrHO7wAd3-txnpJ2grWf8nGksFSnRqNdrKwbbViww6zjqFN4rlzxw0WmnOhUQ=&c=4-PJ6AR2WU4vdAJbwTTBo-acXTz_EmS6s7MV1_4akQAtYALshxUY9w==&ch=ud3Z427g47GDzyH6_lsYEC_fSxwoqSJ8-xWw6R8YledtK75X6Xe1FA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I also want to share with you this brief video that the Rhode Island Department of Health put together for us. I know that things are strange right now, and that we've had to make a lot of changes to how we live. That's why the Department of Health put together this fun video featuring Rhode Islanders showing off their new greetings during the pandemic. You can click below to see the video and share your own new greeting:
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehsqLwCCBGIZk1HcsnalGkUGzIs1moYxujAGro3vY3p4a3lFEQHFiy3eHdgxjYFCQJYTaIuq_Ro6jG-RkPlG-cYUHrVLWqlGM3i-Pesy8tay7y__vbb31K-tPMFeW_oBaZFMLVbfNgG-6CHokMfvQU_XPwYOij93Kw44D_0ukPKoXt7YcftSdVKDniodDwsIzWBPse1iitY=&c=4-PJ6AR2WU4vdAJbwTTBo-acXTz_EmS6s7MV1_4akQAtYALshxUY9w==&ch=ud3Z427g47GDzyH6_lsYEC_fSxwoqSJ8-xWw6R8YledtK75X6Xe1FA==)
---
| Wearing a mask still feels a bit strange, and it's a bit awkward at first - but it's something we all need to get used to. My mask protects you; your mask protects me. I'm asking all Rhode Islanders to be good neighbors.
Remember to be kind. If you see someone who isn't wearing a mask, you can offer to help them get one. We should also remember that folks with certain underlying conditions may not be able to wear a mask.
Thank you for staying strong as we continue to fight COVID-19 in Rhode Island. I'll back on TV at 1:00 p.m. tomorrow to give a live update.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ehsqLwCCBGIZk1HcsnalGkUGzIs1moYxujAGro3vY3p4a3lFEQHFiy3eHdgxjYFCWjMm-ftCUB41yAQPMgReWiVYBz7TgB0cgg3KQlCIYaGx9bU1M7iyzMzkHub216z4BnG6rW3aiPBxtHkPNR5EijZQEi4xCNd4lp-bCHmpM93wxaBvCuP1D0HJpLfZeln5ynbeoSokH-1uH2tMDqk89BCxheEEP8cOX9bstpSfn3aj5SG6WDHX-ytJOv6iIHdwCq72F84aocldq2DsuRUFihW8XKGXpj1zV0frKyuXN733pxtx7DwkmlokKI8BNZg58b868d_zM3U=&c=4-PJ6AR2WU4vdAJbwTTBo-acXTz_EmS6s7MV1_4akQAtYALshxUY9w==&ch=ud3Z427g47GDzyH6_lsYEC_fSxwoqSJ8-xWw6R8YledtK75X6Xe1FA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=ea3cbd69-ec9d-4961-8ae6-e97eee8d9431)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=ea3cbd69-ec9d-4961-8ae6-e97eee8d9431) | [About Constant Contact](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/about-constant-contact)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Four terrific Democrats who could really use your support right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If we don't protect our House majority in 2020, and elect leaders who will put power into the hands of the people, we won't be able to start passing bold reforms and rooting out corruption in 2021... | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525755/45c30650/1c80c009e/66e9f377/419476979/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I'm fighting my heart out to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year -- including in key House races.

Because if we don't protect our House majority in 2020, and if we don't elect leaders who are ready to put power in the hands of the people, we won't be able to start passing bold reforms and rooting out corruption in 2021.

So I've endorsed a bunch of strong Democrats who know how to fight, how to win, and how to get results for working people.

And today, I want to shine a light on four of those Democratic House candidates. They're running in tough races and could really use your support today, if you'd be able to make a financial contribution: **Wendy Davis in Texas's 21st District, Mondaire Jones (New York 17th), Lucy McBath (Georgia 7th), and Hillary Scholten (Michigan 3rd).

[I'm asking because your support would go a long way. If it makes sense for you right now, can you split a donation between Wendy Davis, Mondaire Jones, Lucy McBath, Hillary Scholten, and Warren Democrats to help protect our House majority and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot?](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525755/45c30650/1c80c009e/66e9f376/419476979/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWhzLWxtLW1qLXdkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwNkZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNjExX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-hs-lm-mj-wd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS06F_EGR_TAN_E_20200611_V1S3_P")**

These candidates are the real deal, and I'm proud to endorse them.

>From **Wendy Davis** 's famous filibuster on the Texas Senate floor for women's reproductive freedoms to fighting to expand funding for public education, she has been on the frontlines fighting for Texas working families for years.

Now more than ever, we need fighters like Wendy in positions of power to make big structural changes that will touch lives. If we elect her to Congress, she'll keep fighting for our families in these tough times.

And **Mondaire Jones** also knows that we're in a fight to put power in the hands of working families.

With Mondaire in Congress, we'll gain another chance to achieve the hard-fought wins that bring us closer to big, structural change, and I'm glad to stand with him. His primary is coming up on June 23, and if we pitch in and have his back, we can help send him to Congress.

**Congresswoman Lucy McBath** is running for re-election in a competitive seat that she flipped in 2018.

She knows the importance of working together to accomplish common-sense initiatives that improve the lives of millions across this country. As a mother and advocate, she's fought in Congress to keep our communities safe from gun violence, protect our health care, and keep our promises to our veterans.

Lucy fights from the heart for the people of Georgia's 6th Congressional District, and we need to fight by her side.

**Hillary Scholten** is also in this fight for all the right reasons. She's a mom, a civil rights attorney, and a West Michigan native who's working every day to make her neighbors' lives a little bit better.

Hillary knows what it means to stand up for what's right, even at personal cost. I can't wait to fight arm in arm with Hillary in Congress to fight for health care, protect our environment, and rebuild our economy in a way that works for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. Hillary will lead from her values and make real and lasting change for the people of West Michigan.

**In 2020, Democrats have a real chance to keep the House, take back the Senate, win the White House, and gain significant ground in statehouses across the country -- but only if we all get in this fight and stay in this fight.

[If you're able to, please chip in to help elect Wendy Davis, Mondaire Jones, Lucy McBath, and Hillary Scholten, and help support Warren Democrats as we fight to make our country work for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525755/45c30650/1c80c009e/66e9f376/419476979/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWhzLWxtLW1qLXdkIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwNkZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNjExX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-hs-lm-mj-wd?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS06F_EGR_TAN_E_20200611_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: If we don't protect our House majority in 2020, and elect leaders who will put power into the hands of the people, we won't be able to start passing bold reforms and rooting out corruption in 2021... | | | "" I'm fighting my heart out to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year -- including in key House races. Because if we don't protect our House majority in 2020, and if we don't elect leaders who are ready to put power in the hands of the people, we won't be able to start passing bold reforms and rooting out corruption in 2021. So I've endorsed a bunch of strong Democrats who know how to fight, how to win, and how to get results for working people. And today, I want to shine a light on four of those Democratic House candidates. They're running in tough races and could really use your support today, if you'd be able to make a financial contribution: Wendy Davis in Texas's 21st District, Mondaire Jones (New York 17th), Lucy McBath (Georgia 7th), and Hillary Scholten (Michigan 3rd). "" These candidates are the real deal, and I'm proud to endorse them. From Wendy Davis 's famous filibuster on the Texas Senate floor for women's reproductive freedoms to fighting to expand funding for public education, she has been on the frontlines fighting for Texas working families for years. Now more than ever, we need fighters like Wendy in positions of power to make big structural changes that will touch lives. If we elect her to Congress, she'll keep fighting for our families in these tough times. And Mondaire Jones also knows that we're in a fight to put power in the hands of working families. With Mondaire in Congress, we'll gain another chance to achieve the hard-fought wins that bring us closer to big, structural change, and I'm glad to stand with him. His primary is coming up on June 23, and if we pitch in and have his back, we can help send him to Congress. Congresswoman Lucy McBath is running for re-election in a competitive seat that she flipped in 2018. She knows the importance of working together to accomplish common-sense initiatives that improve the lives of millions across this country. As a mother and advocate, she's fought in Congress to keep our communities safe from gun violence, protect our health care, and keep our promises to our veterans. Lucy fights from the heart for the people of Georgia's 6th Congressional District, and we need to fight by her side. Hillary Scholten is also in this fight for all the right reasons. She's a mom, a civil rights attorney, and a West Michigan native who's working every day to make her neighbors' lives a little bit better. Hillary knows what it means to stand up for what's right, even at personal cost. I can't wait to fight arm in arm with Hillary in Congress to fight for health care, protect our environment, and rebuild our economy in a way that works for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. Hillary will lead from her values and make real and lasting change for the people of West Michigan. In 2020, Democrats have a real chance to keep the House, take back the Senate, win the White House, and gain significant ground in statehouses across the country -- but only if we all get in this fight and stay in this fight. "" Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content (C) 2020 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Jay Inslee
subject: I won't back down from Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is about showing what real leadership looks like.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/1?t=3&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX) Friend, Our nation is facing unprecedented crises -- and Donald Trump is failing us at each and every turn. I'm focused on addressing the real challenges facing my state -- just like so many of my fellow governors. Which is why I was so disappointed, yet again, to learn President Trump took time out of his "busy schedule" focused on "keeping America great" to attack me on Twitter and to threaten Washington state: [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8657?t=4&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX) Our country needs moral, steady leadership. Not a president who would rather tweet than do his job. Here in Washington state, we are doing all we can to fight for our citizens, for our health and safety, and for justice -- it's the right thing to do. There is nothing productive coming from this White House -- just taunts and misspelled tweets. This is why our leadership matters so much: because we're making up for the serious lack of leadership at the top. **Look, I have not reached out to you in nearly six months about fundraising, despite our November election fast approaching.** But this tweet from Donald Trump proves what we're up against: attacks on our state's independence, our leadership and on the very common decency we all expect from each other. I'm not backing down. I won't -- ever. But together, we have to push back against these hateful attacks from Donald Trump. That's why I need you to stand by me. **Donald Trump won't stop tweeting nor will he stop his hateful agenda. And his Republican allies in and out of state will fall in line to attack me and all the progress we've made together. This is what we're up against, and I need your help:[Donate $5 or more to support me in my fight against Trump's hateful agenda and for Washington state values right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8657?t=5&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8651?t=6&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8652?t=7&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8653?t=8&akid=8062%2E868730%2EEYzcfX)

---
Very truly yours,
Jay
